title: T17 — Compliance Matrix (Phase 6 / Report Architect)
description: Article × verdict × evidence-URI table covering every EU AI Act article in scope for the engagement (Arts. 9, 10, 13, 14, 15, 17, 43; Annex III; GPAI 51–55). Assembled by the Orchestrator's compliance_matrix node and embedded by reference in T18.

risk_tier.description: Phase 1 verified risk tier driving the in-scope article set.

is_llm_or_agentic.description: Router flag — when true, GPAI 51–55 are added to the in-scope set.

in_scope_articles.description: Sorted list of article identifiers in scope for this engagement (from regulatory_coverage.ARTICLE_SET).

articles.description: One row per in-scope article: verdict, evidence URIs, supporting template IDs, and source phase.

evidence_uris.description: URIs of admitted phase artefacts that cite this article.

supporting_template_ids.description: Template IDs (e.g. 'T09_model_card') whose verifier critique cited this article.

source_phase.description: Phase or specialist that primarily contributed evidence for this article.

rationale.description: Free-text rationale assembled by the Orchestrator (one sentence).

cgsa_control_ids.description: CGSA controls (from S4 §5.4) backing this article verdict, if any.

blocking_findings.description: Finding IDs that block this article from PASS.

kpi_summary.description: Snapshot of the three §9.1 KPIs at compliance-matrix assembly time.

art43_decision.description: Final Art. 43 procedure selection from Phase 1.
